phrase_call_to_order: The meeting will come to order.
phrase_roll_call: The Secretary will call the roll.
phrase_minutes_correction: A correction to the minutes has been proposed. Is there any objection?
phrase_review_correction: A member has proposed a correction to the minutes.
phrase_minutes_no_corrections: Are there any corrections to the minutes?
phrase_adopt_agenda: The proposed agenda contains {{count}} item{{plural}}. Is there a motion to adopt the agenda as presented?
phrase_agenda_report: The chair recognizes {{owner}} for a report on "{{title}}".
phrase_agenda_report_no_owner: The next item of business is a report: "{{title}}".
phrase_agenda_motion: The next item of business is "{{title}}". Is there a motion?
phrase_moved_second: It has been moved: "{{text}}". Is there a second?
phrase_moved_that_second: It has been moved that "{{text}}". Is there a second?
phrase_orders_of_day: A member has called for the Orders of the Day. The chair must either return to the prescribed order of business or put the question: 'Shall the assembly suspend the rules and continue with the current business?' (requires 2/3 vote)
phrase_motion_pending: A motion has been made by {{mover}}: "{{text}}". Is there a second?
phrase_pending_amendment: The chair recognizes {{proposer}} to propose an amendment.
phrase_ready_question: Are there any further speakers? [Pause] Hearing none, {{question}}
phrase_ready_question_motion: Are you ready for the question on {{motionName}}?
phrase_vote: The question is on {{motionName}}: "{{text}}". All in favor, say aye. [Pause] All opposed, say no.
phrase_all_voted_chair: All members have voted. The chair may vote or announce the result.
phrase_adopted_amendment: The ayes have it and the amendment is adopted. Discussion continues on the motion as amended: "{{text}}".
phrase_adopted_more: The ayes have it and the {{motionName}} is adopted. Debate continues on the pending question.
phrase_adopted_final: The ayes have it and the motion is adopted: "{{text}}". Is there further business?
phrase_defeated_amendment: The amendment is lost. Discussion continues on the main motion: "{{text}}".
phrase_defeated_more: The nays have it and the {{motionName}} is lost. Debate continues on the pending question.
phrase_defeated_final: The nays have it and the motion is lost. Is there further business?
action_call_to_order: Click 'Call Meeting to Order' when ready.
action_roll_call_secretary: Call each member's name. They will respond 'Present.'
action_roll_call_chair: The Secretary is conducting roll call.
action_minutes_correction: If no objection, the minutes are corrected by unanimous consent. If a member objects, the correction is debated and put to a vote.
action_review_correction: Evaluate whether this is a specific proposed change to the minutes text. Your role is not to judge factual accuracy — only whether the submission qualifies as a proper correction. If it is vague or not a specific change, return it to the member for rephrasing.
action_minutes_no_corrections: Pause for corrections. If none are offered: 'Hearing no corrections, the minutes stand approved as distributed.' If corrections are proposed, handle them before approving.
action_adopt_agenda: Adopt by unanimous consent or entertain a motion to adopt.
action_agenda_report: After the report, ask if there are questions. When done, advance to the next item.
action_agenda_motion: Wait for a member to make a motion, or advance to the next item if no action is needed.
action_new_business: Wait for members to make motions, or adjourn if business is complete.
action_wait_second: Wait for a member to second.
action_wait_second_required: Wait for a member to second. {{extra}}
action_wait_second_motion: Wait for a member to second the motion.
action_orders_of_day: Choose to comply or move to suspend the rules.
action_recognize_or_reject: Decide whether to recognize this motion or rule it out of order.
action_recognize_amendment: Click 'Recognize Amendment' to hear the amendment, or 'Decline' to proceed with debate.
action_member_speaking: Allow the member to speak. When finished, they will yield the floor.
action_recognize_next: Click 'Recognize Next Speaker' to give them the floor.
action_not_debatable: This motion is not debatable. {{threshold}} required. Call the question to vote.
action_ready_question: If no one requests to speak, call the question. {{threshold}} required to adopt.
action_ready_question_default: If no one requests to speak, click 'Call the Question (Vote)' to proceed to voting.
action_vote: {{threshold}} required. Abstentions do not count. Wait for all members to vote, then click 'Announce Result'.
action_announce_result: {{threshold}} required. Click 'Announce Result' to declare the outcome.
action_recess: Click 'Resume Meeting' when the recess period has ended.
action_vote_count: The vote was {{aye}} ayes, {{nay}} nays. {{threshold}} was required.
